steps.title: Connect claim and evidence
steps.content: The first sentence says Chaucer pioneered the literary use of English. The next sentence strengthens that claim by giving evidence: his manuscripts contain the first documented uses of many English words.

steps.title: Choose a confirming transition
steps.content: Choice A adds a separate point rather than direct proof. Choice B signals contrast. Choice C signals reversal. The needed transition introduces evidence that supports and intensifies the previous claim. The answer is D.
